signals.headline: Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launch on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launch on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
Wrapped XRP went live on Solana on April 17 via Hex Trust and LayerZero, enabling XRP holders to access Solana's DeFi ecosystem.[1] XRP surged +5.15% in the 48 hours following the launch and was trading at $1.40.[1] However, one analysis noted market skepticism about immediate DeFi adoption impact despite potential benefits.[6]
